claimText: École polytechnique (member school) provides teaching resources for AI integration including detection tools (Turnitin, AI Text Classifier, GPTZero) and curated expert articles on generative AI in higher education.

citation.citationTitle: IA - Ressources pour les enseignants - Teaching & Learning Center
